issues.description: Code inspection found no archive-hardening defect, and `npx tsc --noEmit` plus the socket esbuild bundle both exited 0. However the full requested gates could not be fully reproduced in this read-only sandbox: `npx vitest run` failed at startup with `spawn EPERM`, and `npx prisma validate`/Prisma temp-file based checks failed with an EPERM temp-directory creation error.
issues.recommendation: Re-run `npx vitest run` and the Prisma migration diff/validate command in a writable local or CI environment before treating the change as fully machine-verified.
issues.deferRationale: The failures are environmental permission failures from the read-only sandbox, not observed source defects.
